# VONQ Hiring API (HAPI) Documentation

> Single-API access to 2000+ job boards, social platforms, and niche channels-so ATS partners can offer job advertising as a native feature.

The VONQ Hiring API (HAPI) is a REST API that lets ATS providers post vacancies across 2000+ channels through a single integration. It handles per-channel requirements, credential management, posting lifecycle, status tracking, and payments.

## Base URLs

- Production: https://marketplace.api.vonq.com
- Sandbox: https://marketplace-sandbox.api.vonq.com

## Authentication

Two methods:
- **Secret key** (`X-Auth-Token` header)-server-to-server, does not expire
- **JWT** (`X-Authorization: Bearer` header)-client-side, expires in 7 days

Most endpoints require customer-level auth: secret key + `X-Customer-Id`, or a JWT that embeds customer identity.

## Core Concepts

- **ATS**-your partner account (top-level entity)
- **ATSUser**-a customer within your partner account, identified by customer_id. Auto-created on first use.
- **Product**-a job advertising slot on a channel (job board). Types: Job Marketing, My Contract, CPA+, Bundle.
- **Campaign**-a vacancy posted to one or more channels. States: in progress → online → offline.
- **Contract**-stored credentials for a channel, enabling My Contract ordering.
- **Posting Requirements**-channel-specific fields (facets) needed to post on a given board.
- **Vacancy Fields**-job-level info shared across all products: title, description, location, salary, etc.
- **Taxonomy**-standardized job titles, industries, education levels, seniority, and locations.
- **Wallet**-stored-value payment account per ATSUser, backed by Stripe.

## Typical Integration Flow

1. Authenticate → GET /v3/ats/ats/me/
2. Browse products → GET /products/search/
3. Get posting requirements → GET /products/{id}/specs/
4. (Optional) Validate → POST /campaigns/order?validateOnly=true
5. Order campaign → POST /campaigns/order
6. Track status → GET /campaigns/{id}/status or webhooks
7. Edit/Cancel → PUT /campaigns/{id}/edit or cancellation endpoints

### Wallets & Payments
- [Wallets & Payments](docs/guides/12-wallets-and-payments.md): Wallet management, Stripe, top-ups

## Key API Endpoints

| Endpoint | Method | Description |
|----------|--------|-------------|
| /v3/ats/ats/me/ | GET | Get partner account info |
| /v3/ats/atsuser/me/ | GET | Get customer account info |
| /v3/ats/users/{id}/generate-jwt-token/ | POST | Generate JWT |
| /products/search/ | GET | Search product catalog |
| /products/single/{product_id}/ | GET | Get product details |
| /products/multiple/{products_ids_or_portfolio_id}/ | GET | Get multiple products, favorites, top-ordered products, or portfolio products |
| /products/delivery-time/{products_ids}/ | GET | Get combined delivery timing |
| /products/{id}/specs/ | GET | Get product posting requirements |
| /products/job-titles/ | GET | Search job titles |
| /products/industries/ | GET | List industries |
| /products/location/search/ | GET | Search locations |
| /taxonomy/education-levels | GET | List education levels |
| /taxonomy/seniority | GET | List seniority levels |
| /products/channels/mocs/ | GET | List channels supporting contracts |
| /products/channels/mocs/{id}/ | GET | Channel details with credential fields |
| /contracts/ | GET/POST | List/create contracts |
| /contracts/single/{contract_id}/ | GET/PATCH | Get/update contract |
| /contracts/{contract_id}/ | DELETE | Delete contract |
| /igb/contracts/groups/ | GET/POST | List/create contract groups |
| /campaigns/order | POST | Create campaign |
| /campaigns/{id} | GET | Full campaign details |
| /campaigns/{id}/status | GET | Lightweight status check |
| /campaigns | GET | List campaigns |
| /campaigns/{id}/edit | PUT | Edit campaign |
| /campaigns/validate-campaign/ | POST | Validate campaign payload |
| /v3/cpacampaigns/{id}/applications/ | GET | List CPA+ applications |
| /v3/smartfill/posting-requirements/ | POST | Smartfill posting requirements |
| /v3/smartfill/vacancy-fields/ | POST | Smartfill vacancy fields |
| /v3/smartfill/product-search-filters/ | POST | Smartfill product search filters |
| /v3/products/favorites/ | GET/POST | List/add product favorites |
| /v3/products/favorites/{product_id}/ | DELETE | Remove a product favorite |
| /v3/screening/jobs/ | POST | Create screening job |
| /wallet/ | GET/POST | Get/create wallet |
| /wallet/billing-portal/ | POST | Get Stripe billing portal link |
